Categories.value: Homi Jehangir Bhabha|Atoms for Peace|Extracted images|Files from IAEA Flickr stream|1955 in Geneva|Switzerland photographs taken on 1955-08-20|August 1955 in the canton of Geneva

ImageDescription.value: Seen here at the closing session of the International Conference on the Peaceful Uses of Atomic Energy which opened here on 8 August is dr. Homi J. Bhabha from India, President of the Conference. (Geneva, Switzerland, August 20, 1955)
